params.destReceiver: Address to receive tokens on dest chain
params.destToken: Destination token address on dest chain
params.srcToken: Source token address on this chain

completeSwap(uint256,bytes32,uint256).notice: Mark swap as completed after Li.Fi execution.

expireSwap(uint256).notice: Anyone can expire a swap past its deadline.

initiateSwap(address,uint256,uint256,add.notice: Initiate a cross-chain swap. User must approve srcToken first.

refundSwap(uint256,string).notice: Refund a failed swap. Returns escrowed tokens to user.
